audit_items.proof_trace: parse_msg() can return NULL in multiple conditions (descriptor NULL, allocation failure, reflection NULL) but pb2json() dereferences the result without NULL checks at lines 524-525. json2string() also dereferences the NULL pointer at line 516.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends malformed protobuf message causing GetDescriptor() to return NULL, leading to parse_msg() returning NULL, which pb2json() passes to json2string() causing segmentation fault.
